validations_executed.name: client-intake-template-coverage-review
evidence: docs/client-intake-template.md includes business basics, services, service areas, conversion path, trust proof, content/assets, SEO/AEO, assessment notes, technical/deployment, privacy/compliance, approvals, and launch-pack readiness.

validations_executed.name: missing-info-safety-review
evidence: Template instructs users to leave unknown answers blank, mark verification needs, and avoid invented claims.

validations_skipped.name: json-schema-validation

reason: The client intake worksheet is usable for pre-launch data collection, but this check does not count as a phase-exit Validation Gate pass.
